hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines case assignment and escalation by applying risk-based rules to route compliance reviews efficiently across teams while preserving audit-ready decision logs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance cases slow without clear routing
problem_description: When case assignment relies on manual routing or inconsistent rules, review queues become uneven and escalation delays increase. Compliance teams lose time and visibility, making audit-ready decision logging and coordinated case management more difficult to maintain.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes provider alerts, case data and rule logic to automatically assign reviews into prioritized team queues while preserving audit-ready decision logs and escalation history for operational clarity.
workflow_title: From provider checks to case routing
workflow_description: SFTY applies internal rules to provider outputs then routes reviews and cases through team queues for structured escalation and documented compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Provider-neutral control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects scattered provider outputs into routed cases, decision logs, evidence and reports to streamline compliance workflows without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations requiring structured case assignment, audit-ready evidence preservation, bank due diligence support, and enterprise-grade deployment control from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support automated case routing workflows?
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how risk-based rules assign cases to teams
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs record compliance decision workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for role-based team access
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected workflow layer that connects multiple provider outputs into structured reviews, cases, decisions, evidence and reports for digital asset compliance.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate case routing workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to route cases automatically into team queues based on risk, jurisdiction, product type and escalation policies, improving operational efficiency and review clarity.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence and logs?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade audit logs, decision histories and case documentation to support review readiness and traceable compliance decisions across onboarding, monitoring and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, sanctions and screening providers without replacing them and connects their outputs into one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows but does not replace underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule service providers.
final_title: Route compliance cases into team queues
final_description: Review how SFTY supports risk-based case routing, escalation workflows and audit-ready decision logs for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
